chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1405 of 2019 Before;- Mr. Justice Muhammad Junaid Ghaffar Mr. Justice Zulfiqar Ali Sangi Date of hearing: 14-12-2021 Date of decision: 14-12-2021 Mr. Muhammad Junaid Akram Malik, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General O R D E R Muhammad Junaid Ghaffar, J;- Through this Petition, the Petitioner has sought the following relief;- (a) To declare that the act of the respondents for not considering the appointment of Petitioner on Deceased-Quota for the post of peon to District and Sessions Judge, Sukkur is illegal, malafide, null, void and without any lawful jurisdiction. (b) To direct the respondent No.01 to consider for appoint to Petitioner as Peon in District and Sessions Court Sukkur on Deceased Quota. 2. Notice was ordered and comments have been filed by the office of concerned District and Sessions Judge, wherein it reflects that since 2016 no appointments have been made in the said Category, whereas, the Petitioner had applied for the post of Copyist and he was appointed vide Office Order dated 08-03-2017. On perusal of the record, it reflects that this fact has not been disclosed by the Petitioner. As to appointment on deceased quota is concerned, the same can only be done in accordance with law and by way of process of appointment which as reported by the concerned District Judge, has not been initiated. In view of such position, the Petitioner is at liberty to apply in accordance with law as and when the publication or advertisement is made and such Application be considered as per Rules. The Petition stands disposed of in these terms.

In view of such position, the Petitioner is at liberty to apply in accordance with law as and when the publication or advertisement is made and such Application be considered as per Rules. The Petition stands disposed of in these terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI
